news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers faces Rs. 135.24 Cr penalty under Section 270A for wrong education cess deduction in AY 2020-21.
Company contests penalty citing prior favorable court ruling; no operational impact reported.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers faces Rs. 135.24 Cr penalty under Section 270A for wrong education cess deduction in AY 2020-21.
Company contests penalty citing prior favorable court ruling; no operational impact reported.

news.title:
Fertiliser stocks Chambal, RCF, GNFC may dip as LNG supply disruption from Qatar impacts urea production.
India's fertiliser firms cut output; prolonged supply issues could force shutdowns amid spiking global LNG prices.
news.summary:
Fertiliser stocks Chambal, RCF, GNFC may dip as LNG supply disruption from Qatar impacts urea production.
India's fertiliser firms cut output; prolonged supply issues could force shutdowns amid spiking global LNG prices.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers fell 4% to 430.05 on 4 Mar, underperforming sector/indices.
Despite financial strengths, the stock shows a broader trend of underperformance.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers fell 4% to 430.05 on 4 Mar, underperforming sector/indices.
Despite financial strengths, the stock shows a broader trend of underperformance.

news.title:
CM Airtime Promotion LLP acquired 52,000 shares of Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd on 23rd Feb 2026.
Their total shareholding increased to 1,409,328 shares, representing 0.352% of Chambal's equity voting capital.
news.summary:
CM Airtime Promotion LLP acquired 52,000 shares of Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd on 23rd Feb 2026.
Their total shareholding increased to 1,409,328 shares, representing 0.352% of Chambal's equity voting capital.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers reported a 20% YoY rise in Q3 FY26 revenues to INR 5,898 crores, with PAT increasing 12% to INR 565 crores.
The company expanded its portfolio by introducing 5 new biopesticides and plans 12 more CPC products for launch by FY27.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers reported a 20% YoY rise in Q3 FY26 revenues to INR 5,898 crores, with PAT increasing 12% to INR 565 crores.
The company expanded its portfolio by introducing 5 new biopesticides and plans 12 more CPC products for launch by FY27.

news.title:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.
news.summary:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers has 10% domestic urea market share; Q3 9M FY26 results presented.
Revenue split: 56% urea, 37% complex fertilisers, 7% crop protection & nutrients; growth noted.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers has 10% domestic urea market share; Q3 9M FY26 results presented.
Revenue split: 56% urea, 37% complex fertilisers, 7% crop protection & nutrients; growth noted.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers' Q3 net profit rose 9.7% to ₹586.4 cr, revenue increased 20% to ₹5,898 cr.
EBITDA grew 5.5% to ₹820.8 cr, with margins declining to 13.9% from 15.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers' Q3 net profit rose 9.7% to ₹586.4 cr, revenue increased 20% to ₹5,898 cr.
EBITDA grew 5.5% to ₹820.8 cr, with margins declining to 13.9% from 15.8% YoY.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd to hold an investor call on Feb 11, 2026, at 2:30 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 and 9MFY26 results with senior management participation.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd to hold an investor call on Feb 11, 2026, at 2:30 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 and 9MFY26 results with senior management participation.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Chambal Fertilisers' commercial paper rating at 'ICRA A1'.
The rating applies to a Rs. 2,500 crore program, down from Rs. 4,500 crore.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Chambal Fertilisers' commercial paper rating at 'ICRA A1'.
The rating applies to a Rs. 2,500 crore program, down from Rs. 4,500 crore.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals announces board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to approve standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for dealing in company securities remains closed till Feb 12, 2026, per company code of conduct.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals announces board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to approve standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for dealing in company securities remains closed till Feb 12, 2026, per company code of conduct.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers' Technical Ammonium Nitrate project delayed to April 30, 2026.
Delay attributed to EPC contractor issues at Gadepan, Rajasthan site.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers' Technical Ammonium Nitrate project delayed to April 30, 2026.
Delay attributed to EPC contractor issues at Gadepan, Rajasthan site.

news.title:
CM Airtime Promotion LLP acquired 5,000 shares of Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd on 17 Dec 2025.
Their total shareholding in Chambal Fertilisers increased to 11,47,877 shares, complying with SEBI SAST regulations.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tech Mahindra saw 5.29x volume jump to 2.05L shares, stock fell 0.67% to ₹1564.9. Praj gained 5.2% to ₹352.5 on 4.05x volume rise.
Aegis dropped 1% to ₹743.3, Bharti Hexacom rose 2.2% to ₹1738, Chambal Fertilisers gained 3.4% to ₹451.4, all on volume surge.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra saw 5.29x volume jump to 2.05L shares, stock fell 0.67% to ₹1564.9. Praj gained 5.2% to ₹352.5 on 4.05x volume rise.
Aegis dropped 1% to ₹743.3, Bharti Hexacom rose 2.2% to ₹1738, Chambal Fertilisers gained 3.4% to ₹451.4, all on volume surge.

news.title:
Chambal Fertilisers faces withdrawal order for 11 products in Haryana.
This development could impact its market presence in the region.
news.summary:
Chambal Fertilisers faces withdrawal order for 11 products in Haryana.
This development could impact its market presence in the region.

news.title:
Indosolar, GHCL, and others reduced debt by over 90% in 5 years, improving resilience and profitability.
Indosolar trades at Rs 451 with ROE of 420%, GHCL at Rs 586 with ROE of 19%, and Symphony at Rs 894 with ROE of 32.4%.
news.summary:
Indosolar, GHCL, and others reduced debt by over 90% in 5 years, improving resilience and profitability.
Indosolar trades at Rs 451 with ROE of 420%, GHCL at Rs 586 with ROE of 19%, and Symphony at Rs 894 with ROE of 32.4%.

news.title:
Morocco's OCP expects phosphate exports to India to rise 40% in CY2025, reaching over 2.5 mt, driven by demand for DAP and TSP.
OCP collaborates with Indian firms like PPL, Chambal Fertilisers, RCF, and NFL; promotes customised fertilisers for healthier soils and better yields.
news.summary:
Morocco's OCP expects phosphate exports to India to rise 40% in CY2025, reaching over 2.5 mt, driven by demand for DAP and TSP.
OCP collaborates with Indian firms like PPL, Chambal Fertilisers, RCF, and NFL; promotes customised fertilisers for healthier soils and better yields.

news.title:

Their aggregate shareholding in Chambal Fertilisers increased to 962,073 shares, disclosed under SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.
news.summary:

Acquisition through open market on 25 Nov 2025 complies with SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.
